subject: fix(docs): correct stale file references in DATA_EXTRACTION.md
body:
The re-run section and data files table still referenced the legacy
reverse-geocode.mjs script and its output files. Updated to reflect
the current geocode-all.mjs pipeline which produces different outputs.
